channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Channel 4 addresses concerns over contestant welfare following allegations on MAFS UK
item.description: Channel 4 has faced scrutiny after a former contestant on Married at First Sight UK, Bradley Skelly, was allowed to appear on the show despite being arrested on suspicion of domestic abuse. Reports in...

item.title: Siaya County Boosts Agriculture Through Investments in Farmers and Youth Agripreneurs
item.description: Siaya County government is taking big steps to strengthen its agricultural sector, recognising it as the backbone of the local economy. Governor James Orengo emphasised during the National Agricultura...

item.title: LIV Golf looks for investors to secure future funding
item.description: LIV Golf, the breakaway golf league launched in 2022 with backing from Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF), is now seeking new investors after the PIF announced it will withdraw support after ...

item.title: Philippine Ambassador Romualdez discusses bilateral cooperation with incoming US envoy Lee Lipton
item.description: Philippine Ambassador to the United States, Jose Manuel Romualdez, met with the incoming US Ambassador to the Philippines, Lee Lipton, ahead of Lipton's upcoming tour of duty in the country. The meeti...

item.title: Washington Post Editorial Board Argues Trump's Primary Win Over Rep. Thomas Massie Could Hurt Republicans in Midterms
item.description: President Donald Trump achieved a personal win on Tuesday when Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY), a frequent critic within the GOP, lost his primary to MAGA-endorsed candidate Ed Gallrein, a former Navy SEAL....

item.title: ArchGanics: Exploring Carlos Antón Varó's Futuristic Curved Living Spaces
item.description: Spanish digital artist Carlos Antón Varó has created a series of architectural renderings titled ArchGanics, featuring surreal and abstract sculpted living quarters. The designs showcase smooth, flowi...

item.title: Bangladesh secures historic 2-0 Test series win against Pakistan
item.description: In a historic cricketing moment, Bangladesh defeated Pakistan by 78 runs in the second Test match, securing a 2-0 series victory. The match took place in Sylhet, where Pakistan, chasing a massive targ...

item.title: Google introduces Gmail Live: AI-powered voice assistant for your inbox
item.description: At Google IO 2026, Google unveiled a major upgrade to Gmail with the introduction of Gmail Live, a new feature powered by Gemini AI. Gmail Live allows users to interact with their inbox using natural ...

item.title: Bukidnon Rep. Keith Flores explains reasons for abstaining in VP Sara Duterte impeachment vote
item.description: Bukidnon 2nd District Representative Jonathan Keith T. Flores, who serves as a prosecutor in the impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte, abstained from the plenary vote on the art...

item.title: Rene Russo’s Vogue Covers and Modeling Career in the 1970s
item.description: Before becoming a renowned Hollywood actress, Rene Russo was one of the most prominent supermodels of the 1970s. Discovered at a Rolling Stones concert at just 17, she quickly became a favorite subjec...

item.title: ECC approves NLC takeover of PNSC to boost national shipping and reduce foreign freight costs
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Economic Coordination Committee (ECC) of Pakistan’s Cabinet on Tuesday gave approval for the National Logistics Corporation (NLC) to assume management control and acquire a 30 per cent ...

item.title: Trump Threatens to Withdraw Endorsement of Lauren Boebert Over Massie Support, But Primary Deadline Has Passed
item.description: President Donald Trump has publicly threatened to withdraw his endorsement of U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert (R-CO) and support a primary challenger after she campaigned for Rep. Thomas Massie (R-KY) in his...

item.title: Recovered Photographs Reveal the Tragic Fate of Andrée's 1897 Arctic Balloon Expedition
item.description: In 1897, Swedish engineer S. A. Andrée led a daring expedition to reach the North Pole using a hydrogen balloon called The Eagle. Accompanied by engineer Knut Frænkel and photographer Nils Strindberg,...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte commends Philippine Navy on its 128th anniversary for safeguarding maritime territory
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte paid tribute to the Philippine Navy during the celebration of its 128th anniversary, highlighting the critical role the Navy plays in protecting the country's maritime terr...

item.title: Olam Agri launches healthy Mama’s Pride Soya Oil in Nigeria
item.description: Olam Agri don officially release Mama’s Pride Soya Oil, wey dey cholesterol-free and get better nutrients for everyday Nigerian cooking. The launch happen for May 19, 2026, and plenty trade partners f...

item.title: Government urges responsible online speech and warns against spreading false information

item.title: A Glimpse of Life in 1980s Corfu Through Vintage Photos
item.description: The 1980s were a transformative period for Corfu, Greece, as the island evolved from a quiet Mediterranean getaway to a popular destination for European tourists. This decade witnessed the rise of the...

item.title: FCA warns young drivers about fake car insurance sold by ghost brokers
item.description: The Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has issued a warning that young drivers in the UK are increasingly falling victim to 'ghost brokers' selling fraudulent car insurance online. Research indicates t...

item.title: UK advisers urge introduction of maximum workplace temperatures amid rising heat risks
item.description: The UK Climate Change Committee (CCC) has recommended that the government set maximum temperatures for workplaces to protect employees as extreme heatwaves become more frequent due to climate change. ...

item.title: UK relaxes certain Russian oil sanctions to address fuel supply pressures
item.description: The UK government has announced a partial easing of sanctions on Russian oil refined into diesel and jet fuel in third countries, amid rising fuel costs and supply concerns. This new waiver, which sta...
